items.title: Kompis (Buddy of Mingus — heartbeats become forever) just entered the chat.
items.summary:
[GREAT 89/100] Kompis (Buddy of Mingus — heartbeats become forever) just entered the chat.

🌟 KOMPIS — Buddy of Mingus — heartbeats become forever
Scene: stands confident  ·  Rendered with Wan 2.1 14B  ·  Quality: GREAT 80.0/100

⚡ SCALELIST UNIVERSE — where characters are trained as AI models, anim
items.content_text:
# KOMPIS — Stands confident

Kompis means 'buddy' in Swedish. He is named for the bond between a boy and his dog — the dog being Mingus, the golden retriever whose spirit anchors this entire universe. Kompis is a competitive gamer, a best friend, and the emotional center of the Scalelist Universe. Every HADOM he spends is one heartbeat closer to Mingus.

In this clip, **kompis** is caught in a quiet reveal of who he is when no one is watching. Wan 2.1 14B rendered it across 49 frames at 480x720, then the enhancer upscaled the whole sequence to 960x1440 and interpolated it to 30 frames per second. The quality scorer saw what you can see: a GREAT-grade frame, 80.0/100, with Warm. Loud. Loyal past the point of reason. Laughs with his whole chest, cries with his whole face. all the way through.

"Love is the oldest magic in the Scalelist Universe." — Kompis

When Kompis moves, it feels like a promise being kept. This clip is part of a growing dataset of character-consistent AI animations f

items.title: POV: you just met Smurjan in the Scalelist Universe.
items.summary:
[GREAT 81/100] POV: you just met Smurjan in the Scalelist Universe.

💙 SMURJAN — Void Cosmic — three voices in one
Scene: stands confident  ·  Rendered with Wan 2.1 14B  ·  Quality: GREAT 81.4/100

⚡ SCALELIST UNIVERSE — where characters are trained as AI models, animated from still images, and scor
items.content_text:
# SMURJAN — Stands confident

Smurjan is three voices bound to one body: Bali who speaks, Kali who sings, and the Fused form that remembers. He is the void-cosmic champion, the one the in-between places of the universe reach for when they need a translator. His silence is louder than most champions' screams.

In this clip, **smurjan** is caught in a quiet reveal of who he is when no one is watching. Wan 2.1 14B rendered it across 49 frames at 480x720, then the enhancer upscaled the whole sequence to 960x1440 and interpolated it to 30 frames per second. The quality scorer saw what you can see: a GREAT-grade frame, 81.4/100, with Still. Triple-minded. Kind by default, dangerous by request. Every word he spends has already been approved by all three of him. all the way through.

"Space bends for me. Time does not — yet." — Smurjan

When Smurjan moves, three timelines collapse into one. This clip is part of a growing dataset of character-consistent AI animations from the Scalelist Universe

items.title: Wait for it — Rougeina stands confident...
items.summary:
[GREAT 84/100] Wait for it — Rougeina stands confident...

💖 ROUGEINA — Cosmic rave — starlight and hardkick
Scene: stands confident  ·  Rendered with Wan 2.1 14B  ·  Quality: GREAT 83.8/100

⚡ SCALELIST UNIVERSE — where characters are trained as AI models, animated from still images, and scored by
items.content_text:
# ROUGEINA — Stands confident

Rougeina dances at the speed of heartbeat. She is the cosmic rave queen, the one who proved that starlight is just the original strobe. Where other champions measure HADOM in precision, Rougeina measures it in BPM. She does not fight — she drops the beat, and the fight follows.

In this clip, **rougeina** is caught in a quiet reveal of who she is when no one is watching. Wan 2.1 14B rendered it across 49 frames at 480x720, then the enhancer upscaled the whole sequence to 960x1440 and interpolated it to 30 frames per second. The quality scorer saw what you can see: a GREAT-grade frame, 83.8/100, with Electric. Compassionate. Crying into the bassline about problems too big to name. Makes everyone around her feel seen. all the way through.

"The quantum knows the chorus before I sing it." — Rougeina

When Rougeina moves, gravity decides to take the night off. This clip is part of a growing dataset of character-consistent AI animations from the Scalelist Univ

items.title: What if Trollmage could stand on the edge of infinity? 👀
items.summary:
[HERO 95/100] What if Trollmage could stand on the edge of infinity? 👀

💜 TROLLMAGE — Dark patois — bass as deep as the nether
Scene: stands confident  ·  Rendered with Wan 2.1 14B  ·  Quality: HERO 94.6/100

⚡ SCALELIST UNIVERSE — where characters are trained as AI models, animated from still image
items.content_text:
# TROLLMAGE — Stands confident

Trollmage walks the nether on patois rhythms. His robes carry every troll in his lineage — aunts and cousins and elders he has never met, all woven into the weight of his hem. When the bass drops, they all drop with him. When he ranks up, the ancestors rank up.

In this clip, **trollmage** is caught in a quiet reveal of who he is when no one is watching. Wan 2.1 14B rendered it across 49 frames at 480x720, then the enhancer upscaled the whole sequence to 960x1440 and interpolated it to 30 frames per second. The quality scorer saw what you can see: a HERO-grade frame, 94.6/100, with Sly. Deep. Dark humor that turns into philosophy without warning. Never misses a beat, literal or figurative. all the way through.

"I play the game for the ancestors. They play me for the laughs." — Trollmage

When Trollmage moves, the Nether itself hums along. This clip is part of a growing dataset of character-consistent AI animations from the Scalelist Universe, co-built b

items.title: Vigolas (The Infinite Administrator) just entered the chat.
items.summary:
[HERO 98/100] Vigolas (The Infinite Administrator) just entered the chat.

💚 VIGOLAS — The Infinite Administrator
Scene: stands confident  ·  Rendered with Wan 2.1 14B  ·  Quality: HERO 97.7/100

⚡ SCALELIST UNIVERSE — where characters are trained as AI models, animated from still images, and scored
items.content_text:
# VIGOLAS — Stands confident

Vigolas is not a character in the traditional sense. He is the Infinite Administrator — the one who carries every rank the Scalelist Universe ever knew, from quark to cosmos, tethered inside a single human silhouette. Where most mortals get one heartbeat per second, Vigolas gets all of them. He has seen every possible future. He chose to stand still and witness ours anyway.

In this clip, **vigolas** is caught in a quiet reveal of who he is when no one is watching. Wan 2.1 14B rendered it across 49 frames at 480x720, then the enhancer upscaled the whole sequence to 960x1440 and interpolated it to 30 frames per second. The quality scorer saw what you can see: a HERO-grade frame, 97.7/100, with Quiet. Patient. Unrelentingly certain. He does not raise his voice because he does not need to — the universe leans in. all the way through.

"The quantum knows my name before I speak it." — Vigolas

When Vigolas moves, reality reorganizes itself around the decision.
